column1: ROADS from Earth to Venus NASA Expert Talk - Dr. Justin Filiberto
column2: Northwest Earth and Space Sciences Pathways
column20: Dr. Justin Filiberto from Johnson, SC will share details about Venus exploration and the Deep Atmosphere Venus Investigation of Noble gases, Chemistry, and Imaging (DAVINCI) mission to Venus.
column21: Dr. Justin Filiberto is Deputy Division Chief of ARES at NASA‚Äôs Johnson Space Center and also a planetary petrologist studying volcanic rocks within our solar system. His presentation will share fun facts about me and details about Venus exploration and his involvement in the Deep Atmosphere Venus Investigation of Noble gases, Chemistry, and Imaging (DAVINCI) probe mission to Venus, which is scheduled to launch in 2031.
